EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITransform2D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to methods for transforming geometries using either specific parameters or arbitrary transformation objects (affine transformations, geographic transformations, etc.).

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3BE78AD0-886E-11D1-BC78-0000F875BCCE")]
public interface ITransform2D

Methods

Move(double, double)

Moves dx units horizontally and dy units vertically.

void Move(double dx, double dy)

Parameters

dx double
dy double

Sample Snippet

void MoveVector(ILine v)

Parameters

v ILine

void Rotate(IPoint Origin, double rotationAngle)

Parameters

Origin IPoint
rotationAngle double

void Scale(IPoint Origin, double sx, double sy)

Parameters

Origin IPoint
sx double
sy double

Transform(esriTransformDirection, ITransformation) 

void Transform(esriTransformDirection Direction, ITransformation Transformation)

Parameters

Direction esriTransformDirection
Transformation ITransformation
